headline: Crown Castle (CCI) Completes sale of Fiber Solution Business
summary: Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE:CCI) is one of the Best Digital Infrastructure REITs to Buy According to Analysts. On May 1, the company announced the completion of the sale of its Fiber Solutions business to Zayo Group Holdings Inc., as well as the sale of its Small Cell business to Arium Networks, for $8.5 billion, or […]

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Crown Castle, Raises Price Target to $92
summary: Barclays  analyst Brendan Lynch   maintains Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $91 to $92.
